topComments.text:
Remote shoots are a scam. 
They are literally screen shots and not high rez enough to use for anything
You are posting this in every group. Please stop, its filling my feed this morning. No one wants a remote shoot. People will work with their local photogs.

items.title: Excellent work

items.text: This amazing photographer lost his entire IG page through no fault of his own . 8 years of hard work and artistic expression 😥. He’s an excellent  photographer who does lots of brand work in Europe and remote shoots  anywhere in the world. Andre lives in Europe I’ve used him for Emperor five times in different parts of the world and his work is always stunning and under $200 . Check out his IG page and follow him. He’s doing a remote photoshoot raffle for the next 100 of 1 thousand followers .

CASTING CALL – CAPE TOWN
We are looking for experienced female sprinters for a paid feature film shooting June–September 2026.

Requirements:
• Ages 18–25
• Open ethnicity
• 200m–400m experience (school, varsity level, or higher)

📍 Cape Town
📅 Deadline: 16 April 2026

📩 Send your details to: studio@zestcasting.com

#zestcasting #capetowncasting #sprinters #athlete #featurefilm

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: SPRINTERS – CAPE TOWN

Uncover Talent is looking for experienced 200m - 400m SPRINTERS for an upcoming PAID FEATURE FILM this week.

Requirements:
• Girls, Ages 18 - 25
• Experience 200m - 400m sprinters

Location: Cape Town
Shoot dates: June - September 2026

📧 To Apply:
Send an email to uncovertalent.capetown@gmail.com with:
• Your Full Name
• Date of Birth
• Contact number
• Sprinting footage or showreel

Shortlisted athletes will be contacted with further details.
Tag a athlete who should see this! ✨

#sprinters #featurefilm #capetown #sport

ŁÓDŹ/ POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI i EPIZODYŚCI
📅21-22 oraz 25-26 maja ( zdjęcia dzienne)

🎬Do etiudy reżyserskiej Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy statystów oraz epizodystów do następujących ról:

STATYŚCI:

POMOCNICY W POGRZEBIE ( 30-40 l)

EPIZODYŚCI:

GŁÓWNY POMOCNIK W POGRZEBIE (35-50 l) empatyczny z pogodnym wyrazem twarzy

SCENOGRAF ( 50-70 l) specjalista, zna się na swoim fachu

SCENOGRAF MŁODY (25-29l)- chudy, z melancholijnym wyrazem twarzy

💸OFERTA NONPROFIT

Zapewniamy ciepły posiłek i dobrą atmosfere na planie :))

📞Zainteresowanych prosimy o przesłanie swoich zdjęć oraz informacje o zainteresowaniu konkretną rolą na maila:

probageneralna.film@gmail.com

Miejsce: studio Warszawa Centrum
Temat na motywach literatury: Sklepy cynamonowe
Konfrontowanie się z przeszłością i chorobą ojca:

ludkalina806@gmail.com

Józio (obsadzony) syn
Ojciec - chorujący, mierzący się z chorobą psychiczną, umiejętność krzyku, powiedzenia tekstu z różnym napięciem. Zagrania stanu lekkiego obłąkania.

Adela ponętna pokojówka

items.text:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. It is exactly this direct attack dynamic that makes the scene cinematically effective and interesting for casting, production and directing. 

Kirstin Weiser is a versatile actress who should be considered far beyond action, crime and thriller. She moves convincingly, expressively and powerfully on camera in almost every facet, and can carry toughness, emotion, vulnerability, tension and presence with equal strength. This exact versatility makes her especially valuable for casting, directing and production, because Kirstin is not limited to one type, but is an exciting strong choice for different genres and role profiles. 

Anyone looking for actresses for intense, conflict-driven and physically demanding roles will get a first clear impression here of Kirstin’s impact. This clip is deliberately meant as a preview of the larger trailer that is currently still being worked on. 

If you are looking for strong female profiles for action, crime or thriller, this is already worth watching now. 

Write in the comments which format this scene works best for in your view: action film, crime series or thriller? 

Subscribe to the channel if you want to see the final trailer as well, and share this excerpt with people in casting, directing or production. 

In which genre does this trailer excerpt work most strongly for you: classic action film, dark thriller or hard TV crime drama? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerExcerpt #ActionTrailer #Crime #Thriller

items.summary:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. It is exactly this direct attack dynamic that makes the scene cinematically effective and interesting for casting, production and directing. 

Kirstin Weiser is a versatile actress who should be considered far beyond action, crime and thriller. She moves convincingly, expressively and powerfully on camera in almost every facet, and can carry toughness, emotion, vulnerability, tension and presence with equal strength. This exact versatility makes her especially valuable for casting, directing and production, because Kirstin is not limited to one type, but is an exciting strong choice for different genres and role profiles. 

Anyone looking for actresses for intense, conflict-driven and physically demanding roles will get a first clear impression here of Kirstin’s impact. This clip is deliberately meant as a preview of the larger trailer that is currently still being worked on. 

If you are looking for strong female profiles for action, crime or thriller, this is already worth watching now. 

Write in the comments which format this scene works best for in your view: action film, crime series or thriller? 

Subscribe to the channel if you want to see the final trailer as well, and share this excerpt with people in casting, directing or production. 

In which genre does this trailer excerpt work most strongly for you: classic action film, dark thriller or hard TV crime drama? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerExcerpt #ActionTrailer #Crime #Thriller

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer und ich, wenn Erfahrung sichtbar wird - Wo Bühne, Buch, Kamera und Verantwortung einander begegnen 

Wenn Haltung auf Begegnung trifft 

Dieses Foto zeigt für mich weit mehr als nur ein Interviewmoment. Es zeigt meine Begegnung mit Ralf Scharrer, einem Menschen, der Schauspiel, Schreiben, Design, Moderation und gesellschaftliches Engagement auf besondere Weise verbindet. Genau dort entsteht auch für mich als Christian Weiße ein echter Sinn, weil mediale Arbeit dann besonders wertvoll wird, wenn sie Haltung trägt. 

Vom Erleben zum Erzählen 

Ralf Scharrer steht für Mut, Wandel und Verantwortung. Seine Lesungen, seine Radio Show, Scharrer TV, sein Buch Dem Wahnsinn entkommen und seine Arbeit mit Aktiv gegen Stalking machen deutlich, dass er nicht nur sichtbar sein will, sondern etwas bewegen möchte. Aus persönlichen Tiefschlägen hat er eine öffentliche Kraft gemacht, die anderen Orientierung, Trost und Mut geben kann. 

Wo sein Weg und mein Tun sich verbinden 

Genau hier erkenne ich die Symbiose zwischen uns. Ich arbeite seit Jahren mit Kamera, Interviews, Storytelling, Filmproduktion, Social Media und redaktioneller Sichtbarkeit. Ralf bringt Inhalte mit Tiefe, Erfahrung und gesellschaftlicher Relevanz, ich bringe die mediale Umsetzung, das Gespür für Wirkung und die Fähigkeit mit, solche Themen glaubwürdig nach außen zu tragen. 

Wenn aus Inhalt Wirkung wird 

So wird aus einem gemeinsamen Foto mehr als Erinnerung. Es wird zu einem Zeichen dafür, wie Kunst, Unternehmergeist, Aufklärung und mediale Reichweite zusammenfinden können. Ralf gibt Themen Stimme, ich helfe dabei, dass diese Stimme gesehen, gehört und weitergetragen wird. Genau in solchen Begegnungen liegt für mich der wahre Sinn meiner Arbeit. 

Welche Themen mit echter Haltung und persönlicher Tiefe sollten heute aus Deiner Sicht viel stärker öffentlich erzählt werden? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeiße #AktivGegenStalking #Storytelling #Karrideo

items.text:
"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

topComments.text: Location/City?

‼️Company Update‼️

Please note that the email address (info@liverpoolfilm.com) is no longer active or monitored.

As part of our efforts to save resources and streamline our services, while continuing to deliver the same great quality products, we have moved to a new contact email.

Kindly direct all future enquiries to: liverpoolfilmin@gmail.com

We appreciate your understanding and look forward to filming with you soon.

Sincerely,
Kai Jolley 
Liverpool Film Initiative

user.name: Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

items.text:
We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'We re excited to welcome you to our ACTING FOR SCREEN PROFESSIONAL WORKSHOP Learn essential on- on-camera acting techniques Work with scripted scenes from an original t pilot Explore natural, grounded performance for screen Film selected scenes in professional setting This workshop is designed for actors who want to: Build confidence on camera Develop subtle, truthful performances Experience working on original screen material Scene work in pairs Direction & feedback On-camera filming experience Limited spaces available We' re looking forward to working with you. AJESTIC'

items.text:
**Casting: LA area locals.  ****Seeking families and friends to be contestants on a fun, family friendly game show.  **

A major brand is currently looking for fun, outgoing and excitable families and friends to be contestants on a gameshow shooting 30 minutes outside of downtown Los Angeles.  

All teams must be able to self-report to the location and be available on May 4th and potentially May 5th.

Teams must consist of at least two people and no more than five.  All scenarios are welcome. Families with children between 6 to 12 years old are encouraged to apply.  Participants will be eligible to win various prizes.

To submit, please email a note about your team along with a photo of everyone on the team as well as a telephone number and email address so we can reach out to you to make a brief 1-to-2-minute audition tape.  

Please email [ ](mailto:drivethrusurprise@gmail.com)[factcasting@gmail.com](mailto:factcasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.

https://form.jotform.com/septemberdaniels97/voices-from-another-stage

Chloe, you’ve done amazing so far but you now need your parents or guardians to approach agents to represent you. No money should change hands and you can have head shots taken on iPhone to start. Simple headshots ( look at Spotlight) for advice. You will have to join spotlight once you join an agency .
Look at spotlight for a light of reputable agencies and keep doing what you’re doing and be yourself. Good luck and have fun ⭐️🎬

items.title: Hello,

items.text:
History isn’t coming… it’s already in motion.

For the first time ever, the  BTCC– alongside Excelr8 Motorsport – teams up with multi award-winning filmmaker  Christopher Torretto to bring you the first official BTCC film: SHIFT.

This isn’t just a film.
This is you on the grid.
Hear the engines. Smell the fuel. Feel the roar.

This one is for the fans.

Scan the QR code. Follow @_shift_films on all social media . Hit the linktree link.
Save the Kickstarter now — it goes LIVE Saturday.

Be there at the start.
Be part of history.

Join us Saturday 18th April 2026 on Kickstarter and at the races to see what amazing perks you can grab while being apart of history.

#btcc #racing #film #exclr8motorsport

items.summary:
History isn’t coming… it’s already in motion.

For the first time ever, the  BTCC– alongside Excelr8 Motorsport – teams up with multi award-winning filmmaker  Christopher Torretto to bring you the first official BTCC film: SHIFT.

This isn’t just a film.
This is you on the grid.
Hear the engines. Smell the fuel. Feel the roar.

This one is for the fans.

Scan the QR code. Follow @_shift_films on all social media . Hit the linktree link.
Save the Kickstarter now — it goes LIVE Saturday.

Be there at the start.
Be part of history.

Join us Saturday 18th April 2026 on Kickstarter and at the races to see what amazing perks you can grab while being apart of history.

#btcc #racing #film #exclr8motorsport

sharedPost.text:
New Headshots just in by the incredible Jacqui McSweeney Photography 

I needed someone who understood what I wanted to achieve with my headshots and someone who would guide me with their expertise to achieve it.

This was a collaboration of two artists who had a common understanding and I’m grateful and incredibly proud of the results. 

Jacqui is one of the kindest, most talented and generous souls I have had the pleasure to meet and I highly (HIGHLY) recommend any actors who are looking for that something special in a headshot to contact Jacqui 

https://www.jacquimcsweeney.com/

#headshot #Casting #actors #brighton #acting

items.text:
Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation. 

NOW RECRUITING – OPPORTUNITIES ARE OPEN FOR NEW APPLICANTS 

We are currently expanding and actively seeking: 

🎭 On-Screen Talents 

• Actors/Actresses

• Presenters

• Musicians/Recording Artists

• Models

• Dancers 

• Stunt Performers 

🧑‍🔧👨‍💻 Behind-the-Scenes Creatives 'Send Your Rates of Any of These Services You Do From This List' 

• D.O.P/Post Production Editors/Gaffers/Technitions 

• Fly Cam Drone Operators 'If You Own A Drone That is A Bonus' 

• Jib Crane Film Operators 'If You Own A Jib Crane That is A Bonus' 

• Film Producers/Production Runners/Line Producers 

• Recording Studio Sound Engineers/Mix & Mastering Experts/Film Score Music Composers 

• Film Sound Mixers 

• Photographers 

• Production Equipment Supplyers/Camera Rental Services 

• Film Production Financing Advisors 

• Assistant Directors 

• Personal Assistants 

• Administrators 

• Social Media Promoters/Analysts 

• Marketing Specialists 

• Public Relations 

• Motion Picture Digital Art Graphic Designers 

• Film Writers/Script Editors/Proofreaders/Script Developers 

• Journalists/Bloggers/Radio DJ Presenters 

• Costume Designers 

• Prop/Set Designers/Logistics 

• Hairstylists/Special Effects Makeup Artists 

• Entertainment Lawyer/Solicitors 

• Drivers 'Must Own Vehicle With Valid Licence' 

• Warehouse Film Studio Space 

• Building/Land Sight Health & Safety Inspectors 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Security Guard Officers 

• Film/Event Food & Beverage Catering Business Owners 

• Airspace Pilots 'With Valid Licence' 

• Luxury Vehicle/Car Hiring Services 

• Professional Film/Media Animal Hiring Services 

• Medical First Aid Professionals 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Stage Armoury/Weapon Firearms Prop Services 'With Valid Licence'

🎬 EXCITING ANNOUNCEMENT 

K.A Global is currently in development for a upcoming new TV Series in collaboration with Major TV Network Streaming platforms. 

This is your opportunity to be casted in our upcoming productions 

✨ Join a fast growing creative network 

✨ Build your portfolio & industry experience with credentials 

✨ Collaborate on high level visionary projects 

✨ Participate in Acting Classes

CONSIDERING IN JOINING WITH K.A GLOBAL? 

• Access to industry opportunities 

• Professional development & brand coaching 

• Exposed across Film, Music & Media platforms 

• A supportive, diverse and forward thinking creative community 

• Pathways to mainstream recognition 

To Register with us and become part of the growing database. Simply Apply via this Application Form Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewCNCnx7MBV7HjOibA-Zwav1-cZ8cDtnzlRgZFDNkHev6w4A/viewform?usp=publish-editor 

Further Info About K.A Global is Available via The Page Links | 

Homepage: kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com 

Instagram: @kaglobalofficial 

Facebook: KAGlobalCastings 

YouTube: K.A Global Official 

StarNow: KAGlobal Castings 

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=yPYZOzkLUEewD3Ek

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM London (PAID / EXPENSES COVERED) 🇮🇪

We’re casting 3 MALE ROLES for an upcoming short film and are looking for actors with authentic Irish accents (or strong, convincing ability).

🎭 ROLES:

MAN 1 (Lead / Supporting)

• Playing age: 18–25

• Male, under 30

• Sharp, watchful energy — youthful but not naïve

• Quiet intensity, expressive without saying too much

MAN 2 (Supporting)

• Playing age: 35–55

• Larger build

• Bouncer-type presence — physically imposing, grounded

MAN 3 (Supporting)

• Playing age: 35–55

• Hardened exterior, carries history in his face

• Controlled, internal performance — someone who’s seen things

🎥 PROJECT DETAILS:

• Short film (gritty, character-driven)

• Filming in London

• Shoot dates: 9th - 14th June (not continuous)

items.text:
CASTING DLA FANÓW KULINARIÓW 🍽️ 🧚🏻‍♀️
WIELE RÓL, zajrzyjcie koniecznie👀

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla firmy cateringowej👌

Szukamy osób z dobrą dykcją, wyrazistą mimiką i umiejętnością grania „całym ciałem”. Liczy się luz, humor, naturalność i plastyczność w grze aktorskiej 🎭

 KOGO SZUKAMY?

1. JUSTYNA – mama i menadżerka (35–40 lat)
2. KASIA – ekspertka kulinarna (ok. 30 lat)
3. LIDIA – świadoma redukująca (40–50 lat), naturalna sylwetka
4. PIOTR – 30–40 lat, lekki zarost, zadbany
5. RAFAŁ – ok. 35 lat, normalna sylwetka, „pan z brzuszkiem”
6. BŁAŻEJ – ok. 30 lat, wysportowany sceptyk, tradycjonalista
7. KAROL – 45+, budowlaniec, silny, postawny

🐶 Jeśli masz zwierzę (pies/kot) – koniecznie dodaj informację i zdjęcie w zgłoszeniu

 

TERMINY

⏰ Nadsyłanie self-tape: do 16.04 (godz. 18:00)
🎬 Zdjęcia: 28–30.04.2026

SELFTAPE

1. WIZYTÓWKA
Przedstaw się i pokaż swoją energię ✨

2. SCENA AKTORSKA
Opowiedz:

jaką kuchnię lubisz najbardziej i dlaczego
zabawną sytuację z gotowania (emocje mile widziane 😄)
👉 Zakończ zdaniem:
„Na szczęście nie zawsze trzeba gotować – dobrze, że jest catering!”

 

 DODATKOWO

nagranie wejścia do domu/mieszkania
zdjęcia zwierząt (jeśli posiadasz)
                                                                                          Skontaktujemy się wybranymi osobami! 
                                                                                            Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🔥

Tylko kompletne zgłoszenia zawierające : imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy, wymiary, wizytówka + scenka, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki 🙏🏻

CASTING@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł: viking+ nazwa postaci

Miłego dnia! 🌺

items.text:
WARSZAWA 16 KWIETNIA ‼️
RUSZAMY Z KOLEJNYM, TRZECIM SEZONEM, KULTOWEGO SERIALU, KTÓREGO AKCJA DZIEJE SIE W LATACH 40. 

W związku z powyższym, poszukujemy:

▪️ MĘŻCZYZNY jako OFICERÓW, nie można mieć zarostu! Planowane godziny planu 11-17, stawka 100 po planie.  

▪️ KOBIET i MĘŻCZYZN jako gości restauracji. Planowane godziny planu to 13:30-24, stawka 130 po planie.  

Ze względu na lata 40 obowiązuje naturalny wygląd! U Panów brak długich włosów i widocznych tatuaży. Panie naturalne paznokcie i kolor włosów. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami- SYLWETKA, TWARZ PRZÓD I BOK, WYMIARY, przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując „16.04”

items.text: My daughter is mild on the autism spectrum but I’d love for her to get into acting or modeling! When she is In the mood for pictures she is just the cutest little model! I know it’ll probably be hard but just wanted to get this out there incase anyone has a similar experience! We are NYC based

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of child and smiling
May be an image of child and smiling
May be an image of food and text

topComments.text: Stellar NYC is a strong advocate for differently abled children of all types.

My 6 yr old is diagnosed level 3 and she actually thrives with theater and does really well working on set. Her therapist said she wasn’t surprised because they have a “script” and know what to do. (Apart from being in the world and not understanding social cues and ways to act). I know not everyone’s kid would thrive in that type of environment but wanted to let you know it is possible 🥰

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 13 April 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Exclusive 1-on-1 Acting Workshop (Online)shorter version.

This is a practical, immersive acting course designed to help you become truthful, emotionally connected, and confident on camera.

I’m a British Cinematographer/Director with 30+ years experience and 30+ feature films, working with actors across the world.

🎯 What you’ll gain:• Real emotional depth (not “pretend acting”)• Strong, believable performances on camera• Understanding how film sets actually work• Confidence working with directors and crew• Material for your showreel

🎭 How it works (4 sessions):We focus on:• Moment-to-moment acting• Emotional connection & character work• Camera technique & performance• Real scene work + feedback

Everything is practical and tailored to you—not theory.

💰 4 sessions (1 hour each)Total: $200

This isn’t about tricks—it’s about truth in performance.

If you’re serious about acting, this will change how you approach it.

Let me know if you’d like to start 👍

**CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO SHORT FILM**
**“SNIFFING OUT TROUBLE”**
From ThunderKnight Entertainment Ltd.

Casting for the high-energy music video follow-up to the feature film *HEAVY WEAPON*.

We are seeking **female actors (ages 18–50)** with **basic dance experience** for a stylized, story-driven scene set inside a dance studio, where investigators uncover clues tied to a mysterious crime.

🎬 **What You Get:**
• IMDb credit
• Gas stipend
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

🔥 This is a dynamic, cinematic shoot blending performance, movement, and storytelling — perfect for talent looking to expand their reel with something bold and visually striking.

📩 **To Submit:**
Send headshot + contact info to: **Thunderknightltd@gmail.com**
📱 Or text: **720-569-7460** for details

items.text:
CASTING!!!!!

S.E.B. Casting is casting real families to be in a PSA for the National Forest Foundation. 

Looking for authentic families of 4-5. 
2 Parents between 30-45, 
2 children between 4-8, or one boy between 8-10 & one girl between 11-13 plus her best friend same age 
1 Grandparent over 50 (if available)
Also looking for a family dog! 

Ideal candidates are fun loving, comfortable, friendly, enjoy the outdoors, but do not need to be super athletic or ultra granola types, just regular families who like to go into the forest for a fun day or weekend. All types! All ethnicities! No film or television experience necessary! 

Pay rate is $1400 per person 

Usage is: 60 plus :30, :15, :4 x :06 LIFTS
Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.text:
Głowna rola męska poszukiwana- casting do filmu📽️🎬
Cześć wszystkim! Nagrywamy etiudę i poszukujemy aktora non-profit, który byłby chętny zagrać główną rolę. Nasze wymagania to: 

- Jest z Górnego Śląska (okolice Katowic)

- Potrafi zaciągać się papierosem 

- Blondyn, ostre rysy twarzy 

- Dyspozycyjność na lipiec/sierpień 

-  min. 1,70 wzrostu

-  sceny wymagające bliskości

- wiek ok. 20 lat 

Film ma posłużyć na egzaminy do szkoły filmowej. Będziemy wdzięczni za pomoc w realizacji!!
Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do końca maja.🎥

topComments.text:
NON-PROFIT?
Bez kitu, chore króliki.
I czemu ma to służyć się pytam?
Nie oczekując odpowiedzi żadnej.
Bo ogarnia mnie abominacja,....
NON-PROFIT, yeeeeeah🤡🫡
Nie wiem co to ale fajna przygoda z castingami👹 nawet za free👹

items.summary:
Głowna rola męska poszukiwana- casting do filmu📽️🎬
Cześć wszystkim! Nagrywamy etiudę i poszukujemy aktora non-profit, który byłby chętny zagrać główną rolę. Nasze wymagania to: 

- Jest z Górnego Śląska (okolice Katowic)

- Potrafi zaciągać się papierosem 

- Blondyn, ostre rysy twarzy 

- Dyspozycyjność na lipiec/sierpień 

-  min. 1,70 wzrostu

-  sceny wymagające bliskości

- wiek ok. 20 lat 

Film ma posłużyć na egzaminy do szkoły filmowej. Będziemy wdzięczni za pomoc w realizacji!!
Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do końca maja.🎥

sharedPost.text:
🔥 CASTING ALERT 🔥

‼ Przesłuchania do francuskiej wersji Notre Dame de Paris na trasę 2027! 

🎭 Jeden z najbardziej legendarnych musicali świata poszukuje:

🎤 wokalistów
💃 tancerzy i tancerek
🤸 akrobatów
🔥 breakerów

📩 Zgłoszenia mailowe:

🎤 Casting wokalny: 
Mail: ndpauditionschant@gmail.com
Wyślij: 
filmik z utworem do wybranej roli (link YouTube) 
CV ze zdjęciem

💃 Casting taneczny / akro / breaking: 
Mail: ndpauditionsdanse@outlook.com
Wyślij:
* Tancerze: CV + 2 zdjęcia (portret + cała sylwetka)
* Akrobaci / Breakerzy: video (YouTube) + CV ze zdjęciem

📍 Przesłuchania: maj–czerwiec 2026, Paryż lub okolice
⏰ Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń: 20 maja 2026 r.
_____________________________

#Casting
#Teatr 
#Musical
#NotreDameDeParis

items.text:
🎬 Cześć Warszawa! 🌿

Szukam statystów do scen plenerowych – przechodnie w parku.

📅 Termin zdjęć: 24.04
👤 Wiek: 20–60 lat

⏰ Plan krótki, ale godziny nieznane – wymagana dyspozycyjność całodniowa.

💰 Stawka: 150 zł netto
💸 Płatność przelewem

⸻

📩 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na:
plan@filmakcja.pl

✉️ Tytuł maila: plener 24.04

W zgłoszeniu proszę podać:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• numer telefonu
• aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

⸻

⚠️ Proszę o zgłoszenia osoby zdecydowane – zgłoszenia od razu przekazuję do produkcji.

📞 Do wybranych osób odezwę się najpóźniej do 21.04

⏳ Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do 17.04 do godz. 12:00

⸻

Marta Filmakcja 🎞️🎬

Czekam na Was! 💛

items.text:
[LA CASTING CALL]

Hi Everyone !! 
My team and I are currently casting for short film titled “SAINT SKIN,” which is based on Ricardo Flores’ poetry book. I’d love to share more with anyone interested in playing a supporting or lead role.

The film is emotionally intense—it explores themes of identity and vulnerability. We are looking for Latino Male Actors Age 18-30 , but all male actors are welcome!

If that sounds like something you’d like to hear more about, I’d be happy to send a brief character breakdown and a part of the script for a self-tape audition🐎⭐️

Shooting dates are May 1-3 2026 in Van Nuys!

items.text:
I’m a character actor with 40 years of stage experience transitioning more into film and voice work. I enjoy working in grounded,  story-driven projects and collaborating with filmmakers to discover the character that best serves the story. I live Oregon and Available to travel. 

Regards, 

Paul McGuire 

Actors access
https://resumes.actorsaccess.com/paulmcguireactor

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID NON-UNION COMMERCIAL - Vancouver/Hope BC **

Romer Media is casting for a commercial shoot to be filmed on 

**April 13th** near **Hope, BC**.

**THREE FRIENDS**
Male or female, 20s
Fun, outgoing, energetic individuals. Talent do not need to know each other. We are simply looking for people with strong natural energy and comfort on camera.

**MOTHER**
Female, 30s–40s
Warm, natural, relatable, with a genuine on-camera presence. Looking for someone who can convey a strong and believable connection with a child.

**CHILD**
Male or female, approx. 5–8 years old
Playful, expressive, and comfortable outdoors. We are looking for a natural presence rather than polished performance.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* **Compensation:** $500/day
* **Non-union**
* **Shoot Date:** April 13th
* **Location:** Near Hope, BC
* **Mileage paid**
* **Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation**
* Talent will be required for one shoot day
* This is an outdoor lifestyle commercial
* No dialogue required unless otherwise noted
* No acting experience necessary

**SUBMISSION MATERIAL**
Please email the following to **[pieter@romermedia.com](mailto:pieter@romermedia.com)**:
* Recent photo(s)
* Name, age, and where you are based
* A short note about yourself
* Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle

topComments.text: Sent you an email!
Emailed !!

items.text:
VANCOUVER/HOPE - CASTING CALL – PAID COMMERCIAL SHOOT

We are casting for a commercial shoot filming near Hope, BC on April 13th.

ROLES:
Mother (30s–40s)
Child (approx. 5–8 years old)
Three friends (20s, male or female)

We are looking for people with a natural presence on camera.
For the mother and child, we are looking for a warm, genuine connection.
For the friends, we are looking for individuals in their 20s who are fun, outgoing, and energetic. They do not need to know each other.

DETAILS:
Paid shoot: Rate $300 half day $500 full day
Filming near Hope, BC on April 13th
Mileage paid
Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation

To submit, please send:
Recent photos
Name, age, and location
A short description about yourself
Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle
A short video introduction of yourself
Please email submissions to pieter@romermedia.com

items.text:
**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

topComments.text: How much is the pay rate?
Good luck Olivia!🤩🤗

items.text:
I’m an academic researcher at the University of Nottingham, currently working with the TV Industry Human Rights Forum on a project exploring experiences of child performers in the TV industry.

We are looking to speak with adult actors who previously worked as child actors for a short online interview (30–60 minutes). These conversations are informal and focus on your experiences, reflections, and any insights you’d be willing to share.

Please note that this is an unpaid interview, but your contribution will help inform important research around children’s rights and working conditions in the industry.

If you’d be interested in taking part, or would like more information, feel free to get in touch at amelia.knott@tvhumanrights.org 

It would also be hugely appreciated if you could share this with anyone who might be interested 🙏

Thanks!

items.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL - COMEDIC, ENERGETIC, ORIGINAL MUSICAL 🚨 

SIGMA ACAPELLA

Non-Equity, Profit-Share - Vancouver, Local

Full breakdown and submission details:
https://www.vancouveractorsguide.com/auditions/sigma-acapella-0

Everyone is welcome to submit but we would like to especially encourage LGBTQ+ actors! We also currently have more Male-Presenting roles to cast. Open to new actors.

"When the University’s development plans involve the destruction of all “degenerate" and "unnecessary” clubs and societies, one Frat-Star and his house of Himbos must team up with a Theater Dad and his underdog squad of Theater Kids in order to save the only home they've ever known, and maybe get a little cultured on the way. An original musical that revisits the true, wholesome meaning of “boys being boys” and the endearingly unhinged quality of drama majors, Sigma Acapella promises laughs, songs, dance and romance!"

items.text:
CASTING CALL / PAID / Non-Union

Looking for four diverse young talents for a two-day video production in showcasing community infrastructure and services. Video requiring natural, authentic interactions representing local residents. Non-speaking roles.

Each select talent would be expected to be available for half day over the two day schedule. Please indicate your availability in your response.

Desired Attributes:

  • Non-union

  • Open to all ethnicities

  • Children aged 6-12

  • Available April 27-28 (subject to change) in Lower Mainland

  • Comfortable with professional video production environment

Usage:

  • Municipal marketing and promotional materials in Canada

  • Perpetual

Budget:

  • $450 / person (up to 5 hours)

Apply @ go.opencast.ca/casting/CSC by Apr 17, 2026

Questions? info@opencast.ca

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FILMING SATURDAY, APRIL 25TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series — unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 4 episodes this Saturday and need people for:**
1. 🥩 **6 Vegans vs 1 Secret Meat Eater** — Are you vegan? Or can you fake it? One meat-eater hides among real vegans. If the group catches them, they split the prize. If the liar survives, they take it all.
2. 💰 **Can We Match Your Salary to Your Face?** — People guess each other's income based on first impressions and short conversations. How much does appearance really say about what you earn?
3. 🔀 **Who Is Not a Girl?** — Judges have conversations with contestants without seeing them and decide who's a girl and who's not. Don't worry about your voice; energy and persuasion are your only tools.
4. 💔 **Who Has It Harder — Men or Women?** — An honest, emotional conversation between men and women about the struggles each side faces. No financial debates. Just real talk.

**Details:** 
Location📍: Vancouver, BC 
Date 📅: Saturday, April 25th, 2026 

**🎥 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize. **
**🙅 No acting experience needed — just be yourself and bring energy.**

**Apply here:** [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)
YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia](https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia)
TikTok: [https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2](https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2)

Know someone who'd be perfect? Tag them or share this post.

#vancouver #socialexperiment #4thframemedia #JubileeStyle #RealVsFake #jubilee

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

items.text:
WESTWARD - Student western directed by Nico Guin
A teenage outlaw returns home with a “Wanted —Dead or Alive” poster bearing his face, forcing a silent, heartbreaking reunion with the mother he left behind before he walks into the sunset to face the consequences of a past he can’t escape.

Looking for an older, female actor to play the mother in this 2-3 minute silent western.

This character is in her 40’s or 50’s, is loving yet heartbroken and distraught at the sight of her outlaw son.

Roles are not paid or promised.

We will be shooting during the month of April, and￼ are pretty flexible as it should be only one set. If you are interested or have any questions, you can reach out to me ￼at 914900@dpsk12.net or 7202552717. Thank you!

topComments.text: No male roles?

sharedPost.text:
🚨 SCAM WARNING FOR ACTORS 🚨

I want to warn other actors about a casting scam that was used on me.

They contacted me from racheltennercastingsatl@gmail.com using the name Rachel Tenner, claiming to be casting for an upcoming TV / HBO Max series. The approach looked professional at first: initial casting email, monologue request, “top finalist” message, then an “official casting offer,” followed by a request for SAG-AFTRA ID and a form asking for personal details.

They also sent me a PDF titled THE SILENCE BELOW. In that document, “HBO MAX” is oddly listed as a production company, alongside “TREEHOUSE PICTURES” and “GARY SANCHEZ PRODUCTIONS,” and it promises $140,560 for 4 months while collecting a full set of personal details. It also says it is “for informational purposes only and does not create any contractual obligation,” which is another major red flag.

I then found a Reddit post describing the same scam pattern, using the name Rachel Tenner and fake casting emails, followed by SAG-AFTRA-related pressure and attempts to move the target further into the process. Another commenter said they had the exact same experience.

SAG-AFTRA has also warned performers about scams like this. Their red flags include:

being asked to send money, being asked to contribute to travel or initial expenses, claims that someone else will pay or handle a SAG-AFTRA fee on your behalf, and emails pretending to be from SAG-AFTRA but sent from personal email accounts rather than official SAG-AFTRA domains

Please be careful.
If you receive messages from racheltennercastingsatl@gmail.com or anything similar using the name Rachel Tenner, treat it as suspicious and verify everything independently before sending any personal information, self-tapes, IDs, or documents.

Please share this in actor groups so nobody else gets caught.

@followers #actingscam #castingscam

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting Background EXTRAS for the upcoming Hulu Series "THE LAND" filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from  April 27 - 28th.

*THIS WILL BE A PAID OPPORTUNITY!!*

This project will be taking place in the Cleveland, Ohio Area.

We will NOT be casting minors. Adult only submissions, please!

**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, but talent will likely only work ONE day. Day one will be a Day Shoot. Day two APRIL 28th IS A SPLIT SHOOT. Split Shoot means the scene will start in the late afternoon and finish in the middle of the night!

Project: TV Series 'The Land'

Angela Boehm Casting Team

Does your child shine at home, but struggle socially around other kids?
The team behind The Dog House is making a brand new BBC series about childhood friendship and we’re looking for kids aged 5 to 8 who are finding it hard to make friends. If this sounds like your child - or someone you know - we’re filming in July/August, 2026 and would love to hear from you.

Apply at: https://bemyfriend.tv/

We are looking for children aged 5 to 8 from all over the UK who need little help navigating the world of friendship. Over three days, a team of child psychologists will help them build the social skills and confidence to make real, lasting connections with other kids. If you'd like to help your child make a new friend (with no pressure to take part), please apply at: bemyfriend.tv ロ.キ」'

items.text:
🎭 MALE IMMERSIVE PERFORMER NEEDED – PAID OPPORTUNITY (£400) 🎭

Hi all! I’m Avgi, founder of Genome Theatre – we create high-end immersive and interactive experiences (murder mysteries, bespoke events, luxury parties).

We’re currently casting a male performer for an event on 25th April.

This is NOT a standard acting role – we’re specifically looking for someone with immersive / interactive performance experience.

You must be:
– Confident leading and presenting to groups
– Strong at improvisation and guest interaction
– Able to build atmosphere and “hold a room”
– Experienced in immersive theatre & events.

Details:
– Location: Amberley Castle
– Fee: approx. £400
– Role includes leading interactive games + being part of an immersive storyline

We’re also actively growing our performer team, so this could lead to regular paid work.

👉 Please ONLY apply if you have relevant immersive/interactive experience.

To apply:
– DM me or
– Email: info@genometheatre.co.uk
(Include a short intro + relevant experience/showreel if you have one)

You can see our work here:

sharedPost.text:
🚨 SCAM WARNING FOR ACTORS 🚨

I want to warn other actors about a casting scam that was used on me.

They contacted me from racheltennercastingsatl@gmail.com using the name Rachel Tenner, claiming to be casting for an upcoming TV / HBO Max series. The approach looked professional at first: initial casting email, monologue request, “top finalist” message, then an “official casting offer,” followed by a request for SAG-AFTRA ID and a form asking for personal details.

They also sent me a PDF titled THE SILENCE BELOW. In that document, “HBO MAX” is oddly listed as a production company, alongside “TREEHOUSE PICTURES” and “GARY SANCHEZ PRODUCTIONS,” and it promises $140,560 for 4 months while collecting a full set of personal details. It also says it is “for informational purposes only and does not create any contractual obligation,” which is another major red flag.

I then found a Reddit post describing the same scam pattern, using the name Rachel Tenner and fake casting emails, followed by SAG-AFTRA-related pressure and attempts to move the target further into the process. Another commenter said they had the exact same experience.

SAG-AFTRA has also warned performers about scams like this. Their red flags include:

being asked to send money, being asked to contribute to travel or initial expenses, claims that someone else will pay or handle a SAG-AFTRA fee on your behalf, and emails pretending to be from SAG-AFTRA but sent from personal email accounts rather than official SAG-AFTRA domains

Please be careful.
If you receive messages from racheltennercastingsatl@gmail.com or anything similar using the name Rachel Tenner, treat it as suspicious and verify everything independently before sending any personal information, self-tapes, IDs, or documents.

Please share this in actor groups so nobody else gets caught.

@followers #actingscam #castingscam

items.text:
Hi everyone 👋
I’m a 15-year-old actor based in South Wales and I’m currently looking for new opportunities in theatre, film, or any creative projects.

I’ve performed in Legally Blonde Jr. and Matilda Jr., which have given me strong stage experience and really developed my confidence as a performer. Alongside acting, I also have experience with lighting and sound, so I’m comfortable working both on stage and behind the scenes.

I’m hardworking, reliable, and always ready to take on new challenges and push myself further. I’m especially interested in gaining more experience, building my showreel, and collaborating with others who are passionate about theatre and performance.

If you have any upcoming projects, castings, or opportunities, I’d love to hear from you, please feel free to comment or message me!

Thank you 🎭

items.text:
Casting Asian Actors for some Proof-of-Concept scenes I'm shooting in the last week of April.

I'm putting together an Asian street gang (ie. Chinese, Korean, Japanese) project and am wanting to shoot a few short scenes for it. Basically guys and girls who are lounging around the streets of Vancouver, up to no good....

Inspiration are the Hong Kong triad films starring Andy Lau from the 1990's, would love to cast an Andy Lau type lead actor and some female gang leads. Bonus if the actor can speak Cantonese although this is not important.

The two character types are:

• Andy - 20's, independent, street smarts, living life the way he wants.

• Maggie - 20's, beautiful and either innocent or a gangster girl with a headstrong personality.

This is partly proof-of-concept, partly experimental and is on a volunteer basis but you will get footage for your reel.

Don't have exact dates yet but shooting will be between April 22nd to 27th.

Open to union and non-union actors.

If interested, please email me several professional photos (including one headshot and one full length photo) and resume to castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. If you have video, send that along as well.

Thanks for reading.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, motorcycle and text that says 'Casting Asian Actors East Asian, Chinese, Korean, etc... RG500 for some scenes :วารี'

items.text:
**ULTRA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**NON-UNION - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“GOODBYE, FROM AFAR”***

**Director:** Kevin Jin Kwan Kim

**Producers:** Michael Ren, Bianca Rose Cheung, Nushi Sharma

**Category:** Ultra Short 1-Minute Film - Independent

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** Paid honorarium ($100). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** May 23-24, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable).

**LOGLINE:** A young Korean kid navigates the death of a loved one from abroad, as his mother’s unspoken grief fractures their family.

**MINSEO **- ***Korean, Male, age 7–9*****.** Quiet, observant kid. He doesn’t fully understand what’s happening around him, but he feels all of it. He’s the kind of child who notices when the mood in a room changes, even when nobody says anything out loud. This role has minimal dialogue so the performance really lives in his face, stillness, and reactions. ****Korean-speaking preferred.*** ***MAIN.***

**MOM **- ***Korean, Female, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s mother. She’s carrying fresh grief while trying to hold herself together for her son. She moves through the day like someone split in two, doing what needs to be done, but emotionally somewhere else. Though she is in a state of deep sorrow, she does her best to keep it bottled up in front of her family. ****Must be fluent in Korean. SUPPORTING.***

**DAD **- ***Korean, Male, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s father. Calm, warm and steady, he is trying his best to keep the family afloat while his wife is falling apart. He’s gentle with Minseo and quietly supportive of Mom, but you can feel the weight on him too.*** *Must be fluent in Korean.*** ***SUPPORTING.***

**CHILD VERSION OF MOM **- ***East Asian, Female, age 7–9.*** A child version of Mom, appearing in the final emotional turn of the story. This role is brief but important. Looking for a young actor who can display deep sorrow in a natural, grounded performance.

sharedPost.text:
Damien Lanceley is a British actor and stunt performer primarily known for his work in independent film, specializing in action-heavy and "tough guy" roles. Based in Blackpool, England, he has built a niche playing villains, gangsters, and warriors.
  
​Background and Specializations

​Lanceley is recognized for his athletic, muscular build—a result of his dedication to bodybuilding and MMA training. These skills allow him to perform his own stunts and bring a physical intensity to his characters.

He is often cast in roles that require an intimidating presence, such as:
  
​Antagonists: Villains and henchmen.
  
​Historical/Fantasy Warriors: Vikings and medieval fighters.

​Modern Crime Roles: Gangsters and "bad boy" characters.
  
​Notable Projects

​His filmography consists of several feature-length and short films within the crime and thriller genres:
  
​**Ballistic (2024): A feature film distributed via Amazon, where he plays the character Max. 
 
​Geezers (2024): Plays the role of "Shotgun Jimmy."  

​**Killing Rainbow (2023): Appeared in this Chris Cutler-directed project.  

​Choc-Chips (2024): Played the character Alfie.  

​Blink Time: Appeared in this production by Invisible Sword Productions.  

​Personal Attributes

​Skills: Trained in MMA, boxing, and bodybuilding. He is also noted for his ability to perform various accents, including Irish, Russian, and Polish. 
 
​Training: He has a background in "Action for Screen" training, focusing on the technical requirements of stunt work and on-camera combat.

#DamienLanceley #ActorLife #StuntPerformer #ActionActor #IndependentFilm #BritishActor #Blackpool #FilmIndustry #OnSet #BehindTheScenes #ActionMovies #CrimeThriller #VillainRoles #ToughGuy #ScreenCombat #StuntWork #MMA #Bodybuilding #FightTraining #ActorsLife #CastingCall #FilmPromotion #IndieFilm #Filmmaking #UKActors #MethodActing #ActionForScreen #MovieRoles #FilmCareer #RisingTalent

items.text:
Posting on behalf of one of my students.  Looking for a male actor, age 21-25, for a one-day shoot on Wed, April 22nd from 1-5pm in Los Angeles.

This is NON-PAID.  Actor will receive credit, copy, and a meal.   

About the film:  micro-short with no dialogue about a young man, fresh off a breakup, who sees reminders of his ex everywhere.  

Send headshots, resume, and reel (if you have one) to jgmira@asu.edu

items.text:
Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation. 

NOW RECRUITING – OPPORTUNITIES ARE OPEN FOR NEW APPLICANTS 

We are currently expanding and actively seeking: 

🎭 On-Screen Talents 

• Actors/Actresses

• Presenters

• Musicians/Recording Artists

• Models

• Dancers 

• Stunt Performers 

🧑‍🔧👨‍💻 Behind-the-Scenes Creatives 'Send Your Rates of Any of These Services You Do From This List' 

• D.O.P/Post Production Editors/Gaffers/Technitions 

• Fly Cam Drone Operators 'If You Own A Drone That is A Bonus' 

• Jib Crane Film Operators 'If You Own A Jib Crane That is A Bonus' 

• Film Producers/Production Runners/Line Producers 

• Recording Studio Sound Engineers/Mix & Mastering Experts/Film Score Music Composers 

• Film Sound Mixers 

• Photographers 

• Production Equipment Supplyers/Camera Rental Services 

• Film Production Financing Advisors 

• Assistant Directors 

• Personal Assistants 

• Administrators 

• Social Media Promoters/Analysts 

• Marketing Specialists 

• Public Relations 

• Motion Picture Digital Art Graphic Designers 

• Film Writers/Script Editors/Proofreaders/Script Developers 

• Journalists/Bloggers/Radio DJ Presenters 

• Costume Designers 

• Prop/Set Designers/Logistics 

• Hairstylists/Special Effects Makeup Artists 

• Entertainment Lawyer/Solicitors 

• Drivers 'Must Own Vehicle With Valid Licence' 

• Warehouse Film Studio Space 

• Building/Land Sight Health & Safety Inspectors 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Security Guard Officers 

• Film/Event Food & Beverage Catering Business Owners 

• Airspace Pilots 'With Valid Licence' 

• Luxury Vehicle/Car Hiring Services 

• Professional Film/Media Animal Hiring Services 

• Medical First Aid Professionals 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Stage Armoury/Weapon Firearms Prop Services 'With Valid Licence'

🎬 EXCITING ANNOUNCEMENT 

K.A Global is currently in development for a upcoming new TV Series in collaboration with Major TV Network Streaming platforms. 

This is your opportunity to be casted in our upcoming productions 

✨ Join a fast growing creative network 

✨ Build your portfolio & industry experience with credentials 

✨ Collaborate on high level visionary projects 

✨ Participate in Acting Classes

CONSIDERING IN JOINING WITH K.A GLOBAL? 

• Access to industry opportunities 

• Professional development & brand coaching 

• Exposed across Film, Music & Media platforms 

• A supportive, diverse and forward thinking creative community 

• Pathways to mainstream recognition 

To Register with us and become part of the growing database. Simply Apply via this Application Form Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewCNCnx7MBV7HjOibA-Zwav1-cZ8cDtnzlRgZFDNkHev6w4A/viewform?usp=publish-editor 

Further Info About K.A Global is Available via The Page Links | 

Homepage: kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com 

Instagram: @kaglobalofficial 

Facebook: KAGlobalCastings 

YouTube: K.A Global Official 

StarNow: KAGlobal Castings 

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=yPYZOzkLUEewD3Ek

items.text:
‼️CREW CALL‼️

This is last minute but given some scheduling circumstances JCM Productions needs to fill some essential roles. Given the situation of having a lot of extras on 2 or the 3 day listed below anyone that works in a high capacity environment will be crucial to accomplishing tasks effectively and efficiently in this particular case in the long run.

PROJECT TITLE
--------------------------
Where The Road Ends

PROJECT TYPE
--------------------------
NON-UNION Feature Film

ABOUT THE PROJECT
———————————-
This revolves around a couple going through relationship issues and the friends that try to get their mind off the distaste for each other and while being in town only to go the exact opposite of what was intended. This indie project embraces creativity, collaboration, and experimental storytelling to change things up from the conventional way productions operate to unraveling stories in this case.

SYNOPSIS
—————-
A Romance Drama centers around a couple dealing with the trials and tribulations of a failing relationship and the friends that serve as the voices of reason and reality behind how an initial mistake turns into something far more life changing trying to deal with the consequences and closure to move forward to lead a better life than to live in tragedy.

SHOOTING DETAILS
———————————
📍 Location: Seattle, WA (must be local in PNW)
📅 Dates: April 23rd-25th (Thursday-Saturday)
🎬 Compensation: Food + IMDb credit provided.

SEEKING: 

🔹 GAFFER
• Looking to bring on someone that identifies small details in natural and artificial lighting with outstanding adaptability to achieve great and quality visuals through accents in addition to variations of painterly values in both color and ranging temperatures in any case.

🔹 INTIMACY COORDINATOR 
• Require a trained and full certified not just course applicate with a skill set and knowledge for a passionate kissing moment in 1-3 instances that allow the two talents participating to feel as comfortable and relaxed as possible and know how to stay engaged and detract with necessary.

🔹 2ND AD
• Achieve a talented Second Assistant Director to help the team stay organized, on schedule, and keep the production running as smoothly as possible especially on the time limit and want to have that person be able to keep positive morale for the long day when the time calls for it. In addition manage Crafty and keep Actors active and tracked so as to deliver on great performances throughout the process.

TO SUBMIT
——————
📩 Email matthewmckinney18@gmail.com with:
✅ Reels/Reference Videos of Prior Projects or Letter References
✅ Resume if applicable

topComments.text: Last minute, essential roles but no pay. Sooooo...not essential then. Work for free...on a feature film 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

items.text:
Hi Everyone! 

Lots of spam in this group lately. Not sure who is approving some of these posts, but I am doing my best to go through and delete what I can as much as possible. Thank you all for your comments and questions flagging things for me! 

Just a reminder, this group is only for JOB POSTINGS! No festival promotions, announcements, trailers, information/updates, actor posts etc. It's a group for actors and filmmakers to find jobs. 

Thanks! 

-Vanessa

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤
items.groupTitle: Casting Connect UK (Actors, Filmmakers, Casting Directors)

**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.

Lights, Camera... but is your set safe? 🎬🚑

​
Planning a shoot in North Wales or the North West? Whether it’s a high-action sequence, a remote location shoot, or a busy set with a full cast and crew

you need reliable medical cover.

​That’s where we come in.

 At JKS Medical Services Wrecsam, we provide professional Unit Medics and On-Set First Aid. We understand that time is money in production, and our goal is to keep your crew safe and your shoot on schedule.

​✅ Experienced Unit Medics

✅ Equipment for remote/rugged locations

✅ Discreet and professional service

✅ Based in Wrexham 

​Don't let a medical emergency stall your
 production.

​📩 DM for rates and availability!
 https://www.jksmedicalserviceswrecsam.co.uk/
​#FilmMedics #UnitMedic #NorthWalesFilm #SetSafety #JKSMedical #FilmingInWales

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - FEATURE FILM 🎬

We are currently casting adult actors for an upcoming feature film and are honoured to have now been given the opportunity to begin casting children for this production on behalf of the filmmakers.

A key role requires portraying one character from birth to 4 years old, and we are now seeking:

Caucasian girls across the following age ranges:
Newborn / up to 6 months
6-18 months
18 months - 3 years
3-4 years

Role Note:

This role represents the same child across multiple ages, so we are especially keen to find children who share similar features and overall appearance.

We strongly encourage submissions from:
Siblings or family members who resemble each other
Children with a similar look (facial structure, colouring, etc.)

Details:

Any hair colour considered
No previous acting experience required

Applications must be submitted by a parent or legal guardian

Filming location and dates TBC

📩 To apply, please send:
Child’s name & date of birth
Recent, clear photographs (no filters, no dummies, no hats, no big bows)
Parent/guardian contact details
Current location

Email: info@majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk

Subject: Feature Film Casting - Girl Age & Name 

We are excited to begin this process and would greatly appreciate any shares.

Thank you 🎬

items.text:
CASTING – COMEDIC LEGAL WEB SERIES (DENVER)

Filming a fast-paced, absurd legal comedy (think serious courtroom drama… but completely ridiculous).

Looking for multiple roles (male & female, 20s–50s):
- Confident / over-the-top personalities
- Deadpan / dry humor types
- Big character energy a plus

Shoot details:
 Denver area
 Flexible shoot days (May–June)
 Non-paid 

This is a dialogue-heavy, character-driven project — strong comedic timing matters more than experience.

To submit:
- Headshot (or recent photo)
- Short clip (if you have one) OR quick intro video

DM me.

If you’re funny, confident, or just want to play a ridiculous lawyer — you’ll fit somewhere.

Looking forward to seeing everyone at the May Festival! 

The sense of community these teens are creating is truly something special if you know any young performers who are looking for more opportunities to entertain, please share this information. In addition to our performances, we also have a monthly teen entertainer, meet up, follow auditions. This is an opportunity for teens to work on personal projects with support and feedback from their peers.

sharedPost.text:
Paid TEEN*
story tellers wanted for May Festival Performance 
$25 stipends will be paid to 4-5 performers 

*Atomic theatre Atomic teen program prides itself on creating performance opportunities for young actors to showcase their skills.  

We have been invited to participate in the The Wheat Ridge Historical Society May festival Saturday, May 9 from 10 to 2 at the Wheat Ridge Historical Society Park 4610 N Robb Street. 

Actors dressed in Pioneer or Victorian fashions wanted to read children’s stories at two separate story hours scheduled around the dancing of the May Pole (active performance time approximately one hour) 

AUDITIONS:  Saturday, May 2 10 AM at the Wheat Ridge Grange  3850 High Court 
To reserve your spot email Deletta at atomictheatreinc@gmail.com   
Subject May Festival 

Prepare a reading of a book or song that fits the pioneer/Victorian or May Day theme

We are able to compensate our performers and support young artists. Thanks in part to community donations and a grant from. Wheat Ridge Cultural Commission

For more information about our youth programming visit www.atomictheatre.org 

Image from our pirate themed story hour featuring Mckenna, Autumn, Forrest , Bodhi , Leona and Thunder one of our Reading With The Rabbits

items.text:
**Casting Call**

**No Budget Project**

**Title:** *The Human Error*

**Genre:** Drama / Social Realism
**Duration:** 20 minutes

**Filming Location** : Berlin

**Timeframe** :  July-August 2026

**Synopsis:**
When a routine home visit by a youth welfare officer spirals into a devastating misunderstanding, a loving family is thrust into a bureaucratic storm. In Berlin’s quiet suburbs, Anja and Ben White — caring parents to their eight-year-old daughter Kyra — suddenly find themselves accused of neglect due to a misinterpreted situation at school. The case manager, Claudia Berger, driven by procedure and her own past trauma, makes a well-intentioned but misguided decision that tears the family apart.

As the investigation deepens and the children’s welfare bureaucracy grinds forward, the truth struggles to surface. The film mirrors the painfully slow machinery of the system versus the emotional immediacy of human relationships. Through restrained cinematography and intimate dialogue, *The Human Error* explores how compassion can be buried under regulation — and whether one can ever undo the damage caused by a single wrong judgment.

**Main Cast :**
* **Anja White (young Mother)** – *27 years old*: empathetic but increasingly desperate, she represents the quiet strength of motherhood under pressure.
* **Ben White (young Father)** – *28 Years old*: a calm, analytical father losing faith in the system but fighting for his family.
* **Claudia Berger (Youth Welfare Officer)** – *40 years old*: meticulous and moral, but haunted by her own experiences, embodying the tragic flaw of the “human error.”
* **Kyra  White (Child)** – 7*-9 years old*: innocent and observant, her perspective bookends the film — from trust to confusion, to a fragile reconciliation.

**Tone and Style:**
Naturalistic and emotionally charged, with muted color grading and documentary-style camerawork. Music is minimal, focusing instead on ambient sound to heighten realism. The closing scene brings quiet redemption — Claudia realizes her error, but the family’s trust in the system remains irreparably changed.

sharedPost.text:
Title: Cyborg

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : No budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026
Apply with your profile /pics /showreel to : Preyaanishi@gmail.com 

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast (suggested):

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 16/2026

EIN KULTFILM IM ULTIMATE CUT, DIE INDOGENE BEVÖLKERUNG IM AMAZONAS UND MUMIENHORROR

Quentin Tarantinos Blutoper KILL BILL lief vor mehr als 20 Jahren in 2 Teilen, anno 2026 gibt's ein Revival in Form eines Filmes. 

Auf die Spuren des einheimischen Volkes begibt sich Richard Ladkani in YANUNI, DIE STIMME DES AMAZONAS. Wir konnten mit dem Regisseur der Doku ein Gespräch führen.

Universal Horror der 1930er Jahre anno 2026? Ja, das gibt es, wie stylisch die Neuinterpretation von Warner Bros ist (THE MUMMY), erzählt Ihnen unsere Moderatorin. 

Musikalisch gibt's neben der neuen Single von Shakira natürlich die beste Musik aus 90 Jahren Filmgeschichte. 

Mittwoch 15.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

🎬 CASTING CALL — HARD KNOTS 🎬

We're building something real out here in ATL.

Hard Knots is an original one-hour street drama set on Atlanta's Westside. Season 1 is in production and we are NOW looking for talent.

📍 Set in Atlanta, GA
🎭 All roles. All backgrounds.
🔞 Rated R — this one ain't for everybody
💰 Unpaid / Deferred Compensation

If you got the look, the hunger, and the range — we want to hear from you.

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

#HardKnots #CastingCall #ATL #Atlanta #IndieFilm #StreetDrama #ActorsOfATL #AtlantaFilm #BlackFilm #NewSeries #CastingATL

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

Schon mal eine Rolle angenommen…

und dich danach gefragt, ob du mehr hättest verlangen sollen? 

Du bist nicht allein!

Viele verlieren Geld, weil sie

❌ unsicher sind

❌ keine Strategie haben

❌ oder Angst haben, den Job zu verlieren

Deshalb haben wir ein gratis PDF erstellt,das dir zeigt, wie du deine Gage selbstbewusst verhandelst 💰❗️ 

Schreib deine Stadt + deinen Namen in die Kommentareund wir senden dir den Link 📩
